response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks demonstrable leadership in scaling AI systems in regulated fintech environments, has no clear evidence of managing teams beyond 10 people, and shows no direct experience with credit risk, working capital, or financial compliance infrastructure.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven architectures and real-time systems via GISCollective and DLang work
Hands-on exposure to agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong engineering culture advocacy with TDD, CI/CD, and open-source tooling contributions
concerns: No proven track record leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ in high-stakes environments
Lacks demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulatory compliance
No evidence of designing model-agnostic multi-agent frameworks with feedback loops for financial decisioning
